messages.speaker: S
messages.text: ok so update on the kitchen renovation

messages.speaker: S
messages.text: they found water damage behind the wall. like a LOT. plumber comes thursday

messages.speaker: V
messages.text: nooo. is it covered by insurance at least

messages.speaker: S
messages.text: partially. we'll see what the adjustor says. anyway how's the new job

messages.speaker: V
messages.text: honestly i love it. my team is great, my manager is calm, the coffee is even good

messages.speaker: S
messages.text: good coffee is so underrated. you deserve this after the last place

messages.speaker: V
messages.text: fr. when are we doing dinner btw

messages.speaker: S
messages.text: i'm free next weekend if you are. that thai place?

messages.speaker: V
messages.text: yes 100%. i've been craving pad see ew for a month

messages.speaker: S
messages.text: ty. oh also did you watch the new episode

messages.speaker: S
messages.text: ok ok ok. just watch it tonight ok
